fills_attack.finding_cited_fill_basis: unconditional pm p20 median 0.495 (confirmed) — but that is UNCONDITIONAL
fills_attack.refetch: trig_prices.json: 215 triggered markets over 3d (pm_res_3d), pre-entry Up mid at ~t0+4s from CLOB prices-history, actual Chainlink resolutions

bot_ask_vs_refetch_mid_same32_gated_mark.note: bot's real CLOB asks sit BELOW prices-history mids; prices-history overstates cost

adverse_selection.note: entry price is informative; 55c cap keeps the worse half — worst-case capped construction on mids goes negative (-1.6c), but the live capped engine realized strongly positive

conclusion: NOT refuted. Backtest reproduces exactly; fee math correct; live paper fills (real CLOB asks + 1c slip, fillFrac 1.0) average 49-51c on taken trades and realized gated pnl is positive. However the +4.02c headline leans on an unconditional price stat: conditional on the trigger the book charges ~52.4c mid; honest central estimate of the deployable edge is ~+1.6c to +3c/share, not +4c, with a worst-case (cap adverse-selection on mids) near zero.
